items.headline: Clear weather through the weekend
items.detail: No travel disruptions expected; good turnout conditions for Saturday's drive.

items.headline: TMC parking garage 4 closed for maintenance
items.detail: Direct donors to garage 6; adds ~5 min walk to the donor center.

items.headline: Local news ran a shortage story this morning
items.detail: Regional O-negative supply at 1.5 days; public awareness elevated — good moment to ask.
